name: TransactionOperationContracts
description: Typed requests, results, and stable errors for immutable transaction facts, active replacement history, and single-node hierarchical category assignment; generic initial evidence is a separate atomic effect.
schema_def: ledger.transaction.record input: accountId, canonical signedAmount, ZAR, transactionDate, optional postingDate, ownerSafeDescription, initialEvidence. Result: TransactionDetail plus evidenceId, reconciliation state/detail, direct category and current ancestry, pool, instrument/cardholder known-or-unknown attribution, and active replacement reference. Creation commits initial unassigned pool and independently unknown payment attribution. Identical initial evidence linked to identical facts replays the original; changed facts/evidence conflict. transaction.get optionally returns fact and active replacement chain, lifecycle, category and ancestry, pool, attribution, evidence, reconciliation decisions, and relationships. category.assign/correct targets one active hierarchy node and appends one-active assignment history. void/supersede append lifecycle history and retire incompatible relationships; ordinary supersede never silently transfers dimensions or evidence. Statement-authoritative replacement is invoked only through reconciliation.apply and records every carry-forward event explicitly. All mutations use common idempotency envelopes.
